full_text:
Luo Meng 羅蒙
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Luo Meng (羅蒙). Father of Luo Xian. Served in Shu to avoid the chaos in central China. Luo Meng was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
